# playwright-scenarios

> Claude Code plugin marketplace for scenario-driven Playwright testing — record, crawl, evaluate, convert, review, and generate tests from human-readable scenario markdown.

This repository is a Claude Code plugin marketplace (no application source). It ships a single plugin, `playwright-scenarios`, that lets projects author browser-driven test scenarios as flat markdown files (manually, via autonomous crawl, or by converting existing QA specs), audit those scenarios against the live site, and translate them into test classes. 13 extended tags cover iframe boundaries, alternate paths, network mocking, state pre-seeding, device emulation, and test lifecycle. Per-project behavior is driven by `.claude/playwright-scenarios.local.md` (default stack: Kotlin + Kotest StringSpec + Playwright-for-Java).

## Docs

- [README](README.md): Installation, host-project setup, workflow, capabilities/limitations, and input-document guidance.
- [CLAUDE.md](CLAUDE.md): Repo orientation for Claude — layout, version-bump rule, doc propagation checklist, external dependency, tag list.
- [USAGE.md](plugins/playwright-scenarios/USAGE.md): In-project reference — paste into a host project's CLAUDE.md so Claude Code knows how to use the plugin.
- [DOC_GUIDE.md](plugins/playwright-scenarios/DOC_GUIDE.md): For LLMs authoring input documents — what the framework can/can't handle, 10 authoring rules, document template, self-evaluation checklist.
- [CHANGELOG](CHANGELOG.md): Release notes.

## Website docs

- [index](website/playwright-scenarios/docs/index.md): Site landing page — elevator pitch, quick start, links to each section.
- [tutorial](website/playwright-scenarios/docs/tutorial.md): Step-by-step walkthrough from installation to generated tests.
- [terminology](website/playwright-scenarios/docs/terminology.md): Definitions for scenario, test case, draft, fixture, tag, generated test.
- [workflow](website/playwright-scenarios/docs/workflow.md): The four paths to a reviewed scenario (LLM-authored, existing-doc migration, record, crawl).
- [commands](website/playwright-scenarios/docs/commands.md): Per-command and per-skill reference — signatures, args, flags, examples.
- [capabilities](website/playwright-scenarios/docs/capabilities.md): What the plugin can and can't test, with the full extended-tag table.
- [writing-docs](website/playwright-scenarios/docs/writing-docs.md): Guidance for writing input documents that convert cleanly into scenarios.
- [troubleshooting](website/playwright-scenarios/docs/troubleshooting.md): Setup-time and operational failures with Symptom→Cause→Fix entries.

## Plugin manifests

- [marketplace.json](.claude-plugin/marketplace.json): Marketplace manifest listing the `playwright-scenarios` plugin.
- [plugin.json](plugins/playwright-scenarios/.claude-plugin/plugin.json): Plugin manifest (name, version, description, author).

## Commands

- [/record-scenario](plugins/playwright-scenarios/commands/record-scenario.md): Launch Playwright codegen, capture a real user flow, and write a draft scenario. Accepts `--no-review`.
- [/crawl-site](plugins/playwright-scenarios/commands/crawl-site.md): Read-only site crawl; emits user-flow-oriented drafts to `<scenario_dir>/drafts/`. Accepts `--depth` and `--max-scenarios`.
- [/doc-to-scenarios](plugins/playwright-scenarios/commands/doc-to-scenarios.md): Convert any document into scenario markdown files with proper tag mapping. Accepts `--skip-evaluation` and `--promote`.
- [/generate-fixture](plugins/playwright-scenarios/commands/generate-fixture.md): Scaffold a JSON fixture file from a scenario, document, or interactively. Accepts `--name`.
- [/review-scenario](plugins/playwright-scenarios/commands/review-scenario.md): Audit scenarios against the live site and apply improvements. Accepts `--include-drafts`.
- [/scenario-to-tests](plugins/playwright-scenarios/commands/scenario-to-tests.md): Generate tests from reviewed scenarios. Accepts `--include-drafts` and `--dry-run`.
- [/scenario-status](plugins/playwright-scenarios/commands/scenario-status.md): Health dashboard — review dates, test file status, pass/fail results, coverage gaps.
- [/playwright-scenarios-config](plugins/playwright-scenarios/commands/config.md): View or update per-project settings. Recovery path for malformed config files.

## Skills

- [loading-config](plugins/playwright-scenarios/skills/loading-config/SKILL.md): Reads `.claude/playwright-scenarios.local.md`; bootstraps on first use. Invoked at the start of every command.
- [authoring-scenarios](plugins/playwright-scenarios/skills/authoring-scenarios/SKILL.md): Flat-markdown scenario format reference with 13 extended tags. Used when hand-writing or editing scenario files.
- [evaluate-doc](plugins/playwright-scenarios/skills/evaluate-doc/SKILL.md): Evaluates a QA document against the plugin's capabilities. Structured testability report.
- [fixture-format](plugins/playwright-scenarios/skills/fixture-format/SKILL.md): Defines the canonical JSON fixture format shared across all test generators.
- [debugging-scenarios](plugins/playwright-scenarios/skills/debugging-scenarios/SKILL.md): Guides troubleshooting when generated tests fail — iframe detection, selector drift, timing, stale fixtures.

## Optional
